metadata.description: Commands, agents, hooks, and skills for Python-based deep learning research workflows

plugins.name: dl-research-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for deep learning researchers using Python, including TDD guides, code review agents, and specialized skills for PyTorch, scientific computing, and context engineering

plugins.name: context-engineering-skills
plugins.description: Advanced context engineering skills for optimizing context windows, compression, degradation management, and fundamentals

plugins.name: python-ml-skills
plugins.description: Python library skills for ML/DL research: PyTorch, PyTorch Lightning, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn, networkx, torch-geometric, and more

plugins.name: brainstorming-skills
plugins.description: Software and scientific brainstorming skills for exploring ideas, requirements, and design approaches

plugins.name: git-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Git workflow and version control skills for research projects

plugins.name: scientific-thinking-skill
plugins.description: Scientific critical thinking methodology for systematic evaluation and decision-making

plugins.name: continuous-learning-skill
plugins.description: Instinct-based learning system that observes sessions via hooks, creates atomic instincts with confidence scoring, and evolves them into skills/commands/agents
